category_sources: Official project homepage describes Stencil as a modern living-template engine.
source_facts.description says Stencil is a modern living-template engine for evolving repositories.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and repository name use stencil lowercase branding.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the source documentation surface.
Official homepage is the main documentation surface with guide links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/rgst-io/stencil, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes template modules, adopting existing projects, and native extensions.
source_facts.description identifies living-template functionality for repositories.
